name: Majonezes Burgonya (Potatoes with Mayonnaise)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in their skin until tender but not mushy.
2. Peel the cooked potatoes and slice them into desired size.
3. Prepare the marinade by mixing salt, sugar, white vinegar, onion, and enough water to cover the sliced potatoes. Allow it to stand overnight.
4. (Optional) If you want to eat the onions in your salad, chop them; if not, slice them so they can be discarded before making the dressing.
5. Strain the marinade from the potatoes.
6. Make the dressing by combining sour cream, mayonnaise, sugar, lemon juice, salt, and mustard.
7. Pour the dressing over the marinated strained potatoes.
8. Allow the dish to stand for a few hours before serving.
